description:
You are a machine-learning engineer tidying up your experiment settings before launching a training job.  
Inside the project directory you already have two configuration files:

1. /home/user/project/config/model_config.yaml  
2. /home/user/project/config/run_settings.toml  

Their current contents are:  

/home/user/project/config/model_config.yaml  
```
dataset:
  path: "/data/train.csv"
  batch_size: 32
  shuffle: true
```

/home/user/project/config/run_settings.toml  
```
[run]
epochs = 10
learning_rate = 0.001
```

Goal  
Update both files so that:

• batch_size becomes 64 inside model_config.yaml   
• learning_rate becomes 0.0005 inside run_settings.toml  

In addition, create a plain-text log file named /home/user/project/config/update_log.txt that records exactly two lines (no extra whitespace, blank lines, or comments):

```
Batch size updated to: 64
Learning rate updated to: 0.0005
```

Constraint  
Perform every required change (both configuration edits *and* log creation) in **one single shell command line**.  
The automated grader will verify all three files after your command finishes:

1. /home/user/project/config/model_config.yaml contains the line  
   `  batch_size: 64`
2. /home/user/project/config/run_settings.toml contains the line  
   `learning_rate = 0.0005`
3. /home/user/project/config/update_log.txt exists and its entire content matches *exactly* the two-line block above.

No other file modifications are expected. You do not have root privileges, so stay within /home/user.  
When finished, you can display the updated files to show your work, but that is optional.
truth:
Initial file system state (already present before the agent begins):

Directory: /home/user/project/config

Files and contents:

1. /home/user/project/config/model_config.yaml  
(dataset:
  path: "/data/train.csv"
  batch_size: 32
  shuffle: true)

Exactly:
dataset:\n  path: "/data/train.csv"\n  batch_size: 32\n  shuffle: true\n

2. /home/user/project/config/run_settings.toml  
([run]
epochs = 10
learning_rate = 0.001)

Exactly:
[run]\nepochs = 10\nlearning_rate = 0.001\n

There is **no** /home/user/project/config/update_log.txt file yet.

Expected final state after successful task completion:

1. /home/user/project/config/model_config.yaml now contains:
dataset:\n  path: "/data/train.csv"\n  batch_size: 64\n  shuffle: true\n

2. /home/user/project/config/run_settings.toml now contains:
[run]\nepochs = 10\nlearning_rate = 0.0005\n

3. Newly created file /home/user/project/config/update_log.txt contains exactly (bytes shown):
Batch size updated to: 64\nLearning rate updated to: 0.0005\n

No other files or directories are added or altered.

Grader checks:
• grep -qE '^  batch_size: 64$' model_config.yaml
• grep -qE '^learning_rate = 0.0005$' run_settings.toml
• cmp --silent update_log.txt <(printf 'Batch size updated to: 64\nLearning rate updated to: 0.0005\n')

All must pass for success.
